title: Junior Software Developer
description: Build enterprise-grade software for the African financial sector using Java and Spring Boot. Develop and maintain backend services, write unit and integration tests, and participate in agile ceremonies. Work on identity management, document processing, and workflow automation platforms used by major SA banks.
education: Diploma or Degree in Computer Science or IT

title: Junior Python Developer
description: Work within a fintech company building data pipelines and internal tooling. Write Python scripts, maintain ETL pipelines, support data analysts with automation, and contribute to API development using FastAPI or Flask.
education: Matric plus relevant certification or Degree

title: Junior DevOps Engineer
description: Support cloud infrastructure with CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and monitoring. Work with Docker and Kubernetes to deploy microservices, assist with AWS cost optimisation, write infrastructure-as-code using Terraform, and maintain GitLab pipelines.
education: Diploma or Degree in IT or Cloud. KCNA or CKA a strong advantage.

title: ML Engineer Intern
description: Join the AI/ML team working on document intelligence and OCR systems. Build and evaluate machine learning models using PyTorch and scikit-learn, preprocess data pipelines, integrate models into REST APIs, and contribute to model monitoring. Direct pathway to a full-time ML Engineer role.
education: Degree in Computer Science or Data Science

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Transform raw business data into actionable insights. Write SQL queries, build dashboards in Power BI or Tableau, clean and validate data, produce reports for business stakeholders, and identify trends in customer behaviour data.
education: Degree in Statistics, Commerce, or Data Science

title: Graduate Software Engineer
description: Two-year graduate programme rotating across engineering squads in private banking technology. Build features for internal banking platforms, participate in code reviews, write tests, and be mentored by senior engineers using Java, React, and Azure.
education: Degree in Computer Science or Engineering (minimum 65% average)

title: Junior Cloud Engineer
description: Work on cloud infrastructure for enterprise clients in retail, mining, and financial services. Provision cloud resources on AWS and Azure, support Kubernetes cluster operations, write automation scripts, troubleshoot infrastructure issues, and contribute to cloud migration projects.
education: Diploma or Degree in IT or Cloud. Certifications valued.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js)
description: Build scalable APIs serving financial products to underserved markets across Africa. Design and implement RESTful services in Node.js and TypeScript, write PostgreSQL queries, contribute to TDD practices, and work in a fully remote-first team.
education: Degree or strong portfolio of shipped projects

title: Junior AI/NLP Engineer
description: Work on applied NLP and machine learning projects for SA clients in finance, insurance, and healthcare. Build text classification, named entity recognition, and document summarisation systems using HuggingFace transformer models.
education: Honours or Masters in Computer Science or AI

title: Junior Cloud Engineer
description: Support the internal developer platform team building golden paths for application teams. Maintain Kubernetes clusters, manage Helm chart releases, contribute to IaC using Terraform, build developer documentation, and assist with AWS cost reporting.
education: Diploma or Degree in IT or Cloud. KCNA or CKA preferred.

title: Graduate Data Engineer
description: Build pipelines processing millions of remittance transactions across Africa. Build and maintain ETL pipelines using Python and Apache Airflow, manage data in BigQuery and PostgreSQL, and ensure data quality across ingestion layers.
education: Degree in Computer Science or Data Science

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Build accessible interfaces for Yoco merchant-facing web products. Work in a React and TypeScript codebase, implement designs from Figma, write component tests, and contribute to the shared component library.
education: Degree or bootcamp graduate with strong portfolio

title: Site Reliability Engineer (Graduate)
description: Keep South Africa's largest e-commerce platform running at scale. Work on monitoring and alerting using Prometheus and Grafana, assist with incident response, build internal tooling in Python, and contribute to capacity planning.
education: Degree in Computer Science or Engineering

title: AI Integration Developer
description: Integrate large language model APIs into enterprise client workflows. Build RAG pipelines, LLM-powered document search tools, and AI-assisted workflow automation using Python and Azure OpenAI. Deliver proof-of-concepts for Deloitte clients.
education: Degree in Computer Science or related

title: Junior Software Engineer — Fintech
description: Build payment infrastructure handling transactions across Africa. Implement features in Node.js and TypeScript, design and query PostgreSQL databases, write integration tests, and work on PCI-DSS compliant systems with high ownership.
education: Degree or demonstrable portfolio of backend projects
